title: SteamWorld
description: A Steampunk modpack inspired by the Industrial Era, featuring Create, adventure, decoration and performance. Perfect for SMP servers and content creators.
body:
**SteamWorld** is a steampunk modpack set in an alternate world where steam and coal power all technology. It was designed for the multiplayer server **SteamWorld SMP**, but is also fully playable in singleplayer.

The pack centers around the Create mod and its various extensions, allowing you to build complex machines, trains, airships, transport systems and more. It’s perfect for roleplays, machinimas, recordings and streaming, offering immersive tools for content creators.

### ⚙️ Key Features:
- Creative Engineering: via Create, Steam Rails, Man of Many Planes, Immersive Aircraft and more.
- Adventure & Exploration: new biomes, structures, dungeons, bosses, gear and quests.
- Decoration & Ambience: hundreds of blocks and items from Let’s Do!, Another Furniture, AmbientSounds, Immersive Paintings, and more.
- Farming & Culinary System: expanded farming and cooking from Farmer’s Delight, Hybrid Delights, Nature’s Delight, and Aquamirae.
- Multiplayer Compatibility: integrated voice chat, NPCs with GeckoLib animations, advanced AI, and QoL enhancements for server play.
- Optimized Performance: includes Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, Iris and other modern performance mods.

### 🎻 Original Music & License

All custom music in this modpack was originally composed by **GrandSrPessoa**.

The tracks are licensed under the **Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-SA 4.0)**. This means you are free to use and remix the music, provided you give appropriate credit and share your creations under the same license. For more details, please see the `LICENSE-MUSIC.txt` file included in the modpack.
